body: Confirmed Fri 10/30 10am at your place. Hikari fronts + Sage rasps. Cash or venmo.
thx Jake — venmo works. see you 10am 10/30
Rota week of 10/19: M = Fri PM + Sat AM. Lina Sat PM. Bree Sun. Calls go to clinic main.
Midori — Zoetis confirmed for next week right? Want to lock chute crew. Same $14.20 like we agreed?
convoy 6am Tumalo, Madras cafe biscuits, gate-in 9:30 (per the addendum). see you at the 97 lot.
Got Sat afternoon covered — go win Madras. I'll radio if anything blows up.
Midori it's Ron Blackwood — 63 head ready for the booster whenever Zoetis lands. same line as Henderson?
Route sheet sent to your email. Henderson chute crew still TBD on inbound — Karen wants it locked by Fri.
Driving Obaa-chan to her diabetes follow-up Fri 2:30 in Bend. A1c was 8.4. Don't worry — focus on your race honey.
Also — use my cell not the ranch landline going forward. Landline rings in the barn and I never hear it.
Bend Diesel: your F-250 is ready. Oil + front brakes done. Good for the haul.
